chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-67 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of M.A No.6515/2025 (return of surety) 21.11.2025 Mr.Aijaz Ali Halepoto, Advocate for applicant/surety Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for the State ********* Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that vide Order dated 20.01.2022, the applicant/accused Dildar Ali was granted protective bail by this Court for a period of seven days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further states that thereafter accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period where he was granted interim pre-arrest bail vide Order dated 22.01.2022 and subsequently he has been acquitted by the trial Court vide judgment dated 03.8.2022, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record tendered her no objection. In view of above, listed applications stand disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
